# MuleSoft Anypoint Code Builder

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (master) of Anypoint Code Builder documentation.
> See [Anypoint Code Builder llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/anypoint-code-builder/llms-full.txt) for all the Anypoint Code Builder documentation in one file.

## Content
